title: Why You Need to Teach Kids Money Skills

scenes.text: Money skills learned young can lead to financial freedom!
Studies show that financial education increases future wealth and financial stability.
Wealthy families prioritize teaching kids about budgeting, saving, and investing.
Financial literacy today means security tomorrow.
scenes.label: SECURITY COMES WITH KNOWLEDGE

scenes.text: Follow if you're done staying broke.

description: Teaching kids about money ensures a brighter financial future. Invest in their financial literacy today! Follow for daily money wisdom!
